caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall Hits Martinique with Light Winds and Small Waves
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing heavy rainfall with a 97% chance of precipitation, accompanied by light winds sustained at 12 knots and wave heights reaching 2.4 feet from the southeast. Roatan reports stronger winds up to 25 knots but less impactful weather conditions compared to Martinique's significant rain event.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rainfall Impacting Cadiz Amid Light Winds
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz in the Western Mediterranean is experiencing heavy rainfall with a 93% probability of precipitation today, accompanied by sustained winds of 20 knots and calm seas with no significant wave height. Marseille is seeing lighter conditions with winds up to 17 knots and no notable wave activity, keeping maritime operations steady in the central region.
